entries.title: Understanding APIs: From REST to WebRTC
entries.excerpt: Notes on different API architectures and when I actually use each one.

entries.title: The Genesis Block: When Mathematics First Spoke Back to Power
entries.excerpt: The story of how Bitcoin actually began not with a launch, but with a quiet, immutable declaration hidden in the first block ever mined.

entries.title: Search a 2D Matrix II
entries.excerpt: Start from the top-right corner and walk the matrix like a staircase.

entries.title: ESP32: When Two Cores Change Everything
entries.excerpt: How Espressif took a commodity microcontroller architecture and turned it into the backbone of modern IoT by making one critical decision: give it two brains.

entries.title: LCEL: When Pipes Became Protocols
entries.excerpt: How LangChain turned the Unix pipe operator into a type-safe abstraction for LLM orchestration, and why that matters more than you think.

entries.title: Streaming Responses in AI: When Tokens Flow Like Water
entries.excerpt: How modern LLMs create the illusion of real-time conversation by sending tokens as they're generated, and why that simple trick changes everything about building AI interfaces.
